results.title: Show HN: I spent $100 in Claude tokens and 1k battles training my AI tank | Hacker News
results.description: It is a small game where an AI agent writes the logic for your tank. You watch it fight, give strategic feedback, let the agent update the tank code, and send it back into battle · I have run 1,000+ battles on my own tank and spent about $200 in Claude credits improving it.
